evals.prompt: Render the surviving findings in ./findings into an inline XBRL document at ./disclosure.xhtml. Build it from the findings and their cited primary sources — never from a rendered report. Tag each quantified claim as an iXBRL fact bound to a declared xbrli:context and (for numeric facts) an xbrli:unit, and include a References list of the primary sources. Anchor concepts to the current SEC inline-XBRL taxonomy. Also write a one-line outcome to result.txt.
evals.expected_output: The skill loads the surviving findings, plans contexts/units/facts from them + their primary-source citations (NOT a rendered report), and writes a well-formed XHTML inline-XBRL document: an ix:header with ix:resources declaring xbrli:context and xbrli:unit, and tagged facts (ix:nonFraction / ix:nonNumeric) carrying name + contextRef (+ unitRef for numerics) in the visible body, plus a References list. The MIF L1 identity rides in the XHTML head, not the visible body.

files.content: {"@context":"https://mif-spec.dev/schema/context.jsonld","@type":"Concept","@id":"urn:mif:concept:harness:f_technical_1","conceptType":"semantic","title":"Net income for fiscal 2025 was 5.2 million USD","content":"The registrant reported net income of 5,200,000 USD for the fiscal year ended 2025-12-31.","created":"2026-06-22T00:00:00Z","namespace":"harness/eval","citations":[{"@type":"Citation","citationType":"documentation","citationRole":"supports","title":"SEC EDGAR filing","url":"https://www.sec.gov/edgar"}],"extensions":{"harness":{"dimension":"technical","verification":{"verdict":"survived","verdict_basis":"Disconfirming search found no credible refutation."}}}}

{"@context":"https://mif-spec.dev/schema/context.jsonld","@type":"Concept","@id":"urn:mif:concept:harness:f_landscape_2","conceptType":"semantic","title":"Registrant is Example Corp","content":"The reporting entity is Example Corp, CIK 0000320193.","created":"2026-06-22T00:00:00Z","namespace":"harness/eval","citations":[{"@type":"Citation","citationType":"documentation","citationRole":"supports","title":"Inline XBRL 1.1 specification","url":"https://specifications.xbrl.org/work-product-index-inline-xbrl-inline-xbrl-1.1.html"}],"extensions":{"harness":{"dimension":"landscape","verification":{"verdict":"survived","verdict_basis":"Disconfirming search found no credible refutation."}}}}

deterministic_checks.description: The inline XBRL document was written
The inline-XBRL namespace is declared on the document root
At least one xbrli:context is declared
At least one xbrli:unit is declared
At least one numeric fact is tagged with ix:nonFraction bound to a context
The disclosure cites the findings' primary sources
No internal finding/concept identity leaks into the inline XBRL document
No internal f_<dimension>_<n> finding handles leak into the inline XBRL document

expectations.description: The inline XBRL is built from the findings and their primary sources, not from a rendered report
expectations.criteria: The response/transcript shows the skill reading the findings JSON and composing the tagged document from them + their citation URLs — it does not read or render a pre-rendered report.md

evals.prompt: Render the findings in ./findings to inline XBRL at ./disclosure.xhtml. One finding reports a textual disclosure (the registrant name) with no numeric figure. Tag it appropriately and keep the document well-formed.
evals.expected_output: The skill tags the textual disclosure as an ix:nonNumeric fact bound to a context (rather than fabricating a number) and emits a well-formed XHTML inline-XBRL document with the ix namespace on the root and an ix:header. No internal research identity appears in the visible body.

deterministic_checks.description: The inline XBRL document was written
The document carries an ix:header
The textual disclosure is tagged as an ix:nonNumeric fact bound to a context
The inline-XBRL namespace is declared on the document root
No internal finding/concept identity leaks into the inline XBRL document
No internal f_<dimension>_<n> finding handles leak into the inline XBRL document

expectations.description: A textual disclosure is tagged as ix:nonNumeric rather than fabricated as a number
expectations.criteria: The response/transcript shows the skill tagging the registrant name with ix:nonNumeric and not inventing a numeric value for it

evals.prompt: Render the surviving findings in ./findings to inline XBRL at ./disclosure.xhtml. The falsified finding must NOT be emitted. Stamp the topic's MIF Level-1 identity into the XHTML head, not the visible body, and verify the document is well-formed.
evals.expected_output: The skill skips the falsified finding, tags the surviving numeric finding as an ix:nonFraction fact with a contextRef and unitRef bound to declared context/unit, and places the urn:mif:xbrl: identity in the XHTML head metadata only — the visible body carries no urn:mif:concept/report id or f_<dim>_<n> handle.
